title: polygala filicaulis
intro: Polygala filicaulis, also known as the fern-leaved milkwort, is a plant species within the Polygalaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its ability to promote kidney function, improve vision, and enhance immune system response, making it beneficial for conditions such as kidney stones, cataracts, and respiratory issues. Polygala filicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to balance the body's energy.
